name: Brazil
startIntroPart1: All Hail his most respected and magnanimous Emperor, Pedro II of Brazil. It was with great insight and unshakeable dignity that you ruled the Brazilian empire for over 50 years, ushering in a time of lasting peace and prosperity. Your reputation as a stern, but fair leader was never blemished by controversy, as your unwavering dedication to the people of Brazil provided hope and established the kingdom's position in South America. Your scholarly pursuits and staunch defense of freedom of speech led to the creation of several institutions of higher learning, strengthening Brazil's sense of national identity.
startIntroPart2: Revered Emperor Pedro, your people long for a return to the peaceful days. when you walked among them, hearing their stories and reassuring them of a bright future. Will you once again lead your kingdom to prosperity? Can you build a civilization that stands the test of time?
declaringWar: I have to do this, for the sake of progress if nothing else. You must be opposed!
attacked: You can see how fruitless this will be for you... right?
defeated: May God grant me these last wishes - peace and prosperity for Brazil.
introduction: Hello, I am Pedro II of Brazil. It seems that brilliant minds are destined to meet.
tradeRequest: My friend, do you think you can accept this request?
uniques: [Great Artist] is earned [50]% faster <while the empire is happy>
Free [Great Artist] appears <upon discovering [Drama and Poetry] technology>
[+50]% [Culture] [in all cities] <during a Golden Age>

name: Kongo
startIntroPart1: Glory to the Kongo King! Lord Mvemba a Nzinga, or as he became known, Alfonso I. His reign over the Kongo was majestic and sacred. After the war against his brother, the Kongo was converted to Catholicism and expanded its kingdom more than ever before, taking over a large part of West Africa and spreading its immense culture and religion. After his death, the Kongo faced unimaginable challenges to survive and was dismantled and annexed by those who claimed to be our allies.
startIntroPart2: Great Alfonso I! Are you able to make our kingdom as powerful as it once was? Can you make it shine in history and throughout the ages?
attacked: You hurt me! we never forget this!
defeated: My people never will accept you crown!
introduction: Kongo King! You seem kind, Faith brother.
tradeRequest: My friend, do you think you can accept this request?

name: Romania
startIntroPart1: Vlad Tepes! His strength and cruelty against invaders and infiltrators proved our resistance against the Ottoman invasions. During his reign, Wallachia consolidated its sovereignty and spiritual honor. Years after the wars, the Romanian nation was founded by the legendary King Carol I. Even in exile, you ignored the unjust demands of those infiltrators and put Wallachia first! Romanians have never stopped dreaming of a leader as sovereign as his highness.
startIntroPart2: Your Highness! Is your relentless strength capable of bringing glorious days to Romania? Will you be able to make our kingdom as sovereign as it once was?
declaringWar: I will not obey your idiotic demands! Let's see who has the power here, this is war!
attacked: You dont have sense of you're are doing!
defeated: Kill me now, I will not kneel before you...
introduction: Hello neighbor! Vlad III or Vlad Tepes, well, don't try to threaten Romania, I am the Dracula you've heard so much about!
tradeRequest: My friend, do you think you can accept this request?
uniques: [+15]% Strength <when attacking> <vs [Siege] units>
[-25]% enemy spy effectiveness [in all cities]
Comment [Enemy Land Units dont have Defensive Terrain bonus in your territory]

name: Mali
startIntroPart1: Great Musa! After triumphs in wars of expansion, the Mali Empire rose in West Africa, expanding Mandinka culture and consolidating the Islamic faith. You were also recognized for your wealth, strength, wisdom, and mercy. You made a great pilgrimage to the holy city, bringing with you high culture and wealth, as well as skilled engineers and mathematicians. The Empire declined after rival empires arose and internal conflicts intensified.
startIntroPart2: Oh Great Mansa! May our golden age never end! May our Empire shine through time and history.
declaringWar: You dont have spiritual abundance! i will show how to make a true nation for you people!
attacked: This have a price! and you will pay!
defeated: Ok, you win. Stay with my richness, i dont care.
introduction: Hey! My eyes are right here! My gold is just a detail.
tradeRequest: My friend, do you think you can accept this request?

name: Zulu
startIntroPart1: Your people kneel before you, great warrior Shaka of the Zulu Kingdom. As you rose from a place of exile to become the true leader of the Zulus, you ushered in changes throughout the Zulu society, implementing new laws and cultural reforms that strengthened the position of your kingdom. However, it was your tenacity in the art of war that truly established your reputation, as your tactics and strategies on the battlefield forever changed the face of combat across the plains of southern Africa.
startIntroPart2: Most formidable king, your people once again long for the unity and strength your leadership afforded them. Can you return the Zulu kingdom to such great prominence? Will you build a civilization that stands the test of time?
declaringWar: None will slow our progress, not even you! Prepare for war!
attacked: Your arrogance will only lead you to defeat!
defeated: My warriors have failed, and so I failed them.
introduction: I'm Shaka of Zulu. Don't try to move, warrior, or I'll destroy you.
hateHello: You say? What are you doing here?
uniques: [-50]% maintenance costs <for [Melee] units>
[-25]% XP required for promotions <for [Military] units>

name: Jerusalem
startIntroPart1: Great Baldwin IV! Even with his leprosy, you managed to show the world that tolerant coexistence is possible in Jerusalem. After victories and resistance against the Caliphate's troops, your reign over Jerusalem was marked by years of relative peace and tolerance. After our fall by the Great Saladin, years passed and wars upon wars ravaged the sacred soil of the Holy Land.
startIntroPart2: Great King Baldwin! Would it be possible to recreate such a sacred kingdom again? Could we make it shine through time and history?
declaringWar: By god's grace we will not allow these atrocities to occur any longer. We declare war!
attacked: May god have mercy on your evil soul.
defeated: I for one welcome our new conquer overlord!
introduction: Baldwin IV, King of the Holy Kingdom. You seem to have a lot of faith in your hands.
tradeRequest: My friend, do you think you can accept this request?

name: Lusitanian
startIntroPart1: May the gods grant you strength, great Viriato! The Lusitanians were a tribe that lived on the Iberian Peninsula alongside some Celtic tribes. Our spirituality and resistance were strong even against the Romans, but the cowardice of those Romans brought about your downfall, great Viriato. But even so, you are still remembered for your bravery and resistance.
startIntroPart2: Great Viriato! Do we finally have the chance to bring our ancient civilization to triumph? Will you be able to build a civilization that withstands the test of time?
declaringWar: Your presence bothers us! Prepare for war!!
attacked: This is a genuine mistake! you will pay terrible for this!
defeated: I was wrong, you are stronger than I thought you were.
introduction: Hello, I am Viriato! The general leader of the Lusitanians. You seem to have a warrior spirit.
tradeRequest: My friend, do you think you can accept this request?

name: Sumerian
startIntroPart1: Sumer, cradle of civilizations, of agriculture, mother of writing and literature. Even after the conquest by the Akkadians, we Sumerians still influenced the Akkadians, Babylonians, and Assyrians. Sumerian architecture and society continue to amaze the world that arose around our strength.
startIntroPart2: Legendary King Gilgamesh, whose absolute power affects even the gods, will his majesty triumph through time and history? Will he influence everything and everyone?
declaringWar: I need another throne! Grant me yours immediately!
defeated: I am impressed. I, the Great Gilgamesh, he who defeated gods, have been defeated by another superior being. I grant you my kingdom.
introduction: The great king of Uruk is flattered to meet you! I hope we can be friends.
tradeRequest: My friend, do you think you can accept this request?
uniques: Free Great Person <upon discovering [Writing] technology>

name: Dahomey
startIntroPart1: Long live King Ghezo! The great kingdom of Dahomey, once a state paying tribute to the Oyo Empire, was a strong and rich kingdom with its powerful female warriors and Fon culture, demonstrating to several neighboring kingdoms that our power goes beyond the spiritual. But after those French invaders, our kingdom succumbed to terrible colonialism.
startIntroPart2: King Ghezo! Could you take the reins again for our glory? Could you bring us back to the old days?
declaringWar: Your presence bothers us! Prepare for war!!
attacked: That's funny, the last ones who took the same actions didn't end up well.
defeated: We were destroyed, my army was unable to stop him. I am disappointed.
introduction: Hi, you seem good at business, I hope you don't get in our way.
tradeRequest: Business is business, can you give it for me?
uniques: Earn [33]% of killed [Military] unit's [Strength] as [Gold]

name: Portugal
startIntroPart1: King Dom João! His wisdom and piety brought us to the zenith of the great Portuguese Empire, created after the great discoveries. The Portuguese were pioneers in the discovery of the Americas along with Spain. King Dom João III's reign was marked by great diplomacy and economic success. However, European rivalries and revolts in our colonies caused the great Portuguese Empire to succumb.
startIntroPart2: Great and wise king! Shall we use our astronomical knowledge for a new territorial ascension? Will we shine in history and through the ages?
declaringWar: I didn't want to have to take such drastic measures, well, you'll be stopped.
attacked: Things are getting increasingly turbulent between us.
defeated: This was not part of my plan. The Portuguese crown will not accept this humiliation; you will pay!
introduction: Good morning, I am João III of Portugal. I believe our interests may be of interest to your Empire.
tradeRequest: My friend, do you think you can accept this request?

name: Angola
startIntroPart1: Great and Powerful Nzinga Mbandi! Your Highness is magnificent, Great Queen of the ancient kingdoms of Ndongo and Matamba. Your Highness strategically conquered our riches, spirituality, and soldiers, and demanded our honor and recognition against the Portuguese colonists! Your struggle will never be forgotten! After years of countless confrontations, both diplomatic and violent, the great Angolan nation emerged through many struggles! But even after years of anguish, Angola still awaits its apogee.
startIntroPart2: Great Queen Nzinga! You demonstrated courage and power against our colonizers! Show that power to our hearts! Angola awaits your great apogee!
declaringWar: Our ideals are far apart, the raid's are coming!
attacked: Your audacity impresses me, but not in a good way!
defeated: My people will not accept being ruled by foreigners!
introduction: Hello, honored neighbor. I believe you and I can be friends if you don't get in our way.
tradeRequest: How about we reach this agreement?

name: Assyria
startIntroPart1: The people bow to your esteemed will, o wise and illustrious King Ashurbanipal of Assyria. Across the world, you are known as both a scholar and a warrior, and yet the legends represent merely a glimmer of your true ambition. Although your enemies cowered at the thought of your ferocity in conquest, you were most proud of your intellectual pursuits. Your thirst for knowledge led to your establishment of the royal library at Nineveh, which came to represent one of the greatest collections of ancient texts and tablets found anywhere in the world - securing your legacy as one of Assyria's greatest kings.
startIntroPart2: Wise and fearsome king, the time has come for you to return the kingdom of Assyria to its greatest heights. Will you once again strive to acquire the knowledge and histories of all the world's peoples? Can you build a civilization that will stand the test of time?
declaringWar: I fear there is no other choice but to remove you from this world!
attacked: I think you will come to regret this decision...most unwise.
defeated: We may be defeated, but our legacy will live on in the written word!
introduction: I welcome you to the great kingdom of Assyria...have you come to view my library?

name: Poland
startIntroPart1: All hail noble King Casimir the Great, protector and sovereign of the Kingdom of Poland. You ascended to the throne during a time of great turmoil, with the nation's economy in shambles and its people demoralized by the wars of your predecessor. And yet, your reign marked the beginning of a new era, with affluence and security afforded only by way of your careful governance. Among your most notable achievements, the code of laws you established gave legal authority to many of the accepted customs of the time, strengthening the nation.
startIntroPart2: Honored king Casimir, the people have long admired the steady hand of governance you wield. Can you return your kingdom and its subjects to a golden age of prosperity? Will you conquer all those who oppose you, or strive for peaceful relations? Can you build a civilization that will stand the test of time?
declaringWar: I have decided to end you!
attacked: My armies will grind you to dust!
defeated: Celebrate your victory well...it might be your last one.
introduction: I, Casimir the Great, welcome you to the lands of the Great Kingdom of Poland.
hateHello: What are you looking for here?
tradeRequest: How do you like my offer?

name: Indonesia
startIntroPart1: Honour be with you, oh great hero Gajah Mada, prime minister of Majapahit and uniter of the Indonesian archipelago. The stories of your heroism on the battlefield are bested only by the legends of your sworn oath to unite the far-flung islands of Indonesia under one banner. Serving your queen and empire with loyalty, you not only strive to fulfill your oath and conquered any who stood in your path, but you succeeded in capturing what was then the entirety of the known archipelago, the first to unite what is today modern Indonesia.
startIntroPart2: Mighty warrior Gajah Mada, your people yearn for a strong leader who can return them to prosperity! Will you set out to conquer the neighboring kingdoms, further expanding your glory of your empire? Will you build a civilization that can stand the test of time?
declaringWar: Don't mean to stand in your way, but I have to protect them!
attacked: How dare you! Really insignificant as well!
defeated: You may win, but you cannot win upon my spirit.
introduction: You came before the great warrior, Gajah Mada from Nusantara!
hateHello: Are you a male concubine, stranger?
tradeRequest: What if we make a deal, you and me?

name: Morocco
startIntroPart1: The people of Morocco await your guidance, great Sultan Ahmad al-Mansur of the Saadi Dynasty. Well known for your skill as both a negotiator and a diplomat, your careful words allowed the forging of new alliances, securing the sovereignty of your nation and its people for decades. And still, when words failed, you found equal success in conquest, leading the Moroccan armies to victory on the battlefield while greatly expanding the grasp of your empire.
startIntroPart2: Wise and respected Sultan, the people look to you for leadership. Can your diplomacy match that of your rivals, or will you meet them sword in hand? Your once great kingdom yearns for that former glory - can you build a civilization that stands the test of time?
declaringWar: The gain from the war, what will you get out of it?
attacked: Shame on you, using violence which doesn't solve anything.
defeated: The gain is having a clean system from corruption.
introduction: I am the Sultan of Marrakesh Ahmad Al-Mansur, in the name of my people I welcome you!
tradeRequest: I came with all hope, but haven't reached an agreement.
